modules.name: journal
modules.description: Resizable journal canvas with smart text editing, markdown formatting, headings, lists, and exports.

modules.name: tidy
modules.description: Selectively hide or fade individual modules and cables without changing global cable opacity.

modules.name: grab
modules.description: Auto-triggered one-shot recorder. Records until silent, writes WAV with optional fades and normalise.

modules.name: jump
modules.description: Saved-view bookmarks plus fuzzy module finder. Nine slots, back/forward history, Raycast-style palette.

modules.name: take
modules.description: Session-aware recorder. Rolls a continuous buffer of the last N seconds; click save to capture retroactively. Voice-memos style vertical waveform.

modules.name: capture
modules.description: One-click PNG snapshot of the visible rack. High-DPI native, hides itself during the shot so the capture button doesn't appear in the screenshot.
